fields.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
fields.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life. Features deep bass, comfortable over-ear design, and built-in microphone for calls.

fields.name: Smartwatch Pro
fields.description: Advanced smartwatch with heart rate monitoring, GPS tracking, sleep analysis, and 7-day battery life. Water resistant to 50 meters.

fields.name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
fields.description: Compact multi-port adapter with HDMI 4K, USB 3.0, SD/TF card reader, and 100W PD charging. Compatible with laptops and tablets.

fields.name: Classic Denim Jacket
fields.description: Timeless denim jacket made from premium cotton. Features button front closure, chest pockets, and a comfortable regular fit. Perfect for layering.

fields.name: Cotton Crew Neck T-Shirt
fields.description: Soft 100% organic cotton t-shirt with a relaxed fit. Pre-shrunk fabric, reinforced stitching, and a comfortable crew neckline.

fields.name: Running Shoes Ultra
fields.description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Features arch support and durable rubber outsole for road and trail.

fields.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
fields.description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 24h or hot 12h. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, fits most cupholders. 750ml capacity.

fields.name: Yoga Mat Premium
fields.description: Non-slip exercise mat with alignment lines. Made from eco-friendly TPE material, 6mm thick for joint protection. Includes carrying strap.

fields.name: The Art of Clean Code
fields.description: A practical guide to writing maintainable, readable, and efficient code. Covers best practices, design patterns, and real-world examples for modern developers.

fields.name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
fields.description: Waterproof portable speaker with 360-degree sound. 12-hour battery, built-in mic, and USB-C charging. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

fields.name: Python Mastery: From Zero to Hero
fields.description: A comprehensive guide to Python programming covering fundamentals, OOP, web development, and data science. Includes hands-on projects and exercises.

fields.name: Data Structures & Algorithms Explained
fields.description: Deep dive into essential data structures and algorithms with practical examples in Python. Covers trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and more.
